filledSlots.game_data: {"lesson_title":"Animal Kingdom Space Adventure","total_waves":30,"planets":["Savanna Star","Oceanus Prime","Glacier Alpha","Amazonia Moon"],"vocabulary_groups":{"mammals":["Lion","Elephant","Monkey","Giraffe"],"marine_life":["Whale","Shark","Dolphin","Octopus"],"birds":["Eagle","Penguin","Parrot","Owl"],"reptiles":["Snake","Turtle","Crocodile","Lizard"]},"power_ups":["Vocabulary Shield","Speed Reader Boost","Double Point Star"],"boss_fights":[{"wave":10,"name":"The Great Alpha Lion","description":"Identify savanna animals to defeat."},{"wave":20,"name":"The Deep Sea Kraken","description":"Identify marine life to defeat."},{"wave":30,"name":"The Ancient Mammoth","description":"Ultimate animal vocabulary review."}],"educational_objective":"Enhance animal recognition and spelling skills through an interactive space shooter format."}
